seo.title: Bake a Cheese - Garlic it and Eat - Marinda Kook

html:
It's a delicious dish without measures as a starter or just a nibble. Quick and tasty.
YOU NEED:

  • 1 camembert
  • fine garlic
  • sprig of rosemary
  • olive oil

NOW:

      1. set your oven to 180 degrees Celsius
      2. cut your cheese in half
      3. spread thick garlic on one half and put a sprig of rosemary on the garlic
      4. close the cheese and put garlic and rosemary on top of the cheese
      5. drizzle with a small bit of olive oil
      6. bake for about 15 minutes in the oven until the cheese is soft

Enjoy the deliciousness with crackers or freshly baked bread.
